fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. install-tools.sh offers doc-viewer, log-viewer, spec-viewer, and ticket-viewer as installable tools. 2. The default install set refreshes those viewer PATH binaries. 3. Existing PATH-first extension behavior remains unchanged.
fields.title: [install-tools] Install all viewer binaries

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. install-tools.sh offers doc-viewer, log-viewer, spec-viewer, and ticket-viewer as installable tools. 2. The default install set refreshes those viewer PATH binaries. 3. Existing PATH-first extension behavior remains unchanged.
fields.implementation_summary: install-tools.sh now registers doc-viewer, log-viewer, spec-viewer, and ticket-viewer in the shared tool tables, supported-tool help text, and default install set so PATH-first workflows can refresh every shipped viewer binary from this checkout.
fields.title: [install-tools] Install all viewer binaries
fields.validation_summary: Validated by running ./install-tools.sh for the viewer binaries and confirming refreshed PATH executables under ~/.cargo/bin. ticket-viewer required stopping the stale running backend process (PID 8988) on Windows so cargo could replace the locked executable.
